title: tetracera fagifolia var. borneensis
intro: Tetracera fagifolia var. borneensis, also known as Bornean Whirlflower, is a plant species belonging to the family Dilleniaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. These compounds have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to various health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and gastrointestinal relief. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Tetracera fagifolia var. borneensis are prepared as herbal teas or infusions, which can be taken to alleviate various health issues.
